characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Jerri Blank: Former teen runaway and ex-con, going back to high school at age 46 to get her life back on track.Much hilarity ensues. Beauty Inversion: As you can see from her page picture,Amy Sedarisis actually quite dishy. Catchphrase: "I've got somethin' t' say!" Criminal Procedural: Frequent references are made to Jerri's delinquent past, which heavily influences her actions during the show. Friend to All Living Things: Jerri has a new pet every episode of Season 1,which always dies a horrible death by the end.

characters.name: Flatpoint High Faculty
characters.description: Principal of Flatpoint High. Blackman is more like a tyrant than a school administrator. Portraits and other portrayals of him can be seen in various places in the school, including the bathrooms. Malaproper: See the quote above. Selective Obliviousness: Principal Blackman remains unaware that Noblet and Jellineck are lovers no matter what they say or do in his presence, even after hecatches them together in the boiler room, and Jellineck has his pants off. Why Did It Have to Be Snakes?: Greg Hollimon has a strong phobia of drowning. Making the brief shot of him canoeing in the school pool in the background a hard scene for him to perform. Teacher of history and English, editor of the school newspaper, and assistant to the principal. Perhaps all these responsibilities, his tendency to burst into tears, and his obsession with food are symptomatic of dealing with his gay affair with Geoffrey Jellineck.

characters.name: Flatpoint Students
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: The most frequent target of Jerri's racist comments. Horrible Judge of Character Unlucky Childhood Friend: Has a crush on Jerri in Season 1. Entendre Failure: Jerri is constantly coming on to her, but she either ignores or misunderstands her comments. Teacher/Student Romance: Tammy is in a committed andveryopen relationship with the school science teacher, to the point of beingSickeningly Sweet Hearts. The rest of the school thinks it's sweet though.
